items.story_excerpt: The Bottleneck Isn't Writing Code Anymore. It's Trusting It. The speed at which AI generates code has officially surpassed our capacity to review it. For decades, the bottleneck in software engineering was writing the code. Today, the bottleneck has shifted entirely to trusting that the code can run effectively in production and actually solve the business p
